description: 50-item ranked search results, compressed via explicit SELECTIVE. The compressor returns a TOC entry per item — this scenario guards against top-ranked results getting demoted out of the TOC or losing their ID in the 80-char preview window.

qa_probes.question: Does the TOC expose a selection_key?
